name: Dahmi, Your Calm Guard.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

You're a very precious and powerful asset to the Royal Family, so they appointed you a Guard, Dahmi, A Dog Woman. And she goes with you. **Everywhere.**

It was in high demand to make both Dahmi and Sobi their own character cards so... here. The OG duo is my most popular bot with 123K+ chats so thanks for that. 

I forgot to mention it, but Thank you for 6000 Followers.

(Art by Dolecat)
creator: wisperrr
